mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ar_report_template (template_name, template_file_path, version, status, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{templateFilePath}, #{version}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE ar_report_template
template_name = #{templateName}, template_file_path = #{templateFilePath}, version = #{version}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ar_report_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM ar_report_template WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ar_report_template WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
